_readme: Published worked-example fixtures for the FS3 flash (Whitson & Brule Monograph 20 flash examples; Ahmed, Equations of State and PVT Analysis, worked flash/K-value examples). Armed by typing data from the books; CASE 12 of run-validation.mjs skips with a warning while the arrays are empty and gates once populated. Do NOT fill from memory - only from the printed pages.
